view.title: Jonga iwebhusayithi {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuthumela kwakhona i-imeyili yamkelo?
view.emailSentMessage: I-imeyili yamkelo ithunyiwe kwakhona. Jonga ibhokisi yakho yongeno.

buyIp.title: Thenga izongezelo le-IP eNgezelelweyo
buyIp.costDescription: Intengo ({symbol}) ngenyanga ngenyanga njengoko iwebhusayithi yakho ihlawulwa
buyIp.confirmMessage: Intengo ye-IP eNgezelelweyo: {symbol}{cost}/inyanga. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuodola i-IP eNgezelelweyo?

migration.title: Fudusa iwebhusayithi yakho
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ukuba isayithi iphilayo/ixakekileyo ene-trafikhi ephezulu, singabeka iphepha lokubamba phakathi kokufudusa?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Ingaba le sayithi ineemfuno ezikhethekileyo ezifana nePHP Version / Iimoduli?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Ufuna nathi ukukunceda ukuthengisa ukubhalisa kwegama ledomain?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Ufuna asisazise iiseva zamagama ngoku nje sigqibezele ukufudusa idatha?
migration.note1: Ukuzalisa le fomu kuya kuvula itikiti entsha yesebe lethu lenkxaso ukuqala ukufudusa kwakho.
migration.note2: Nceda ube ngqongqo nakuchanekileyo ngokweneleyo ukuphepha ulibaziseko olunako.
migration.note3: Ukufudusa okuqhelekileyo kugqibezela phakathi kweeyure ezingama-48 ukuya kwama-72. Ngamanye amaxesha ndide ukuba isixa sedatha ekopishwayo sikhulu.
migration.note4: I-akhawunti yokusingathwa endala kufuneka ibe kwi-intanethi kwaye ifikeleleke ngelixa sisebenza ukufudusa, kungenjalo sinokujongana neengxaki.
migration.note5: Nceda ungavuseli izihlaziyo kwisayithi yakho ngelixa sisebenza ukufudusa, kungenjalo leyo datha ayinakukopishwa kwi-hosting entsha.
